name: create-github-issue
description: Turn a rough request into a full GitHub Issue via a GitHub MCP. Two-phase flow: proposal (title, body, estimate with visible hour breakdown, SP encoded as label) → per-ticket confirmation → issue creation. Repo, labels, milestone mode, language convention, estimation matrix and split thresholds are configured per-repo via `.claude/create-github-issue.json`; sensible defaults apply when keys are absent. Triggers on DE/EN phrasings like 'mach daraus ein GitHub-Issue', 'leg ein Issue auf GitHub an', 'open a GitHub issue for …'.
